TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Malataw == Malataw ('Amis: Malatao/Malataw/Maladau/Maratoo :281; Kafalan: Maladaw/Matalel; Sakizaya: Maladaw; Dipong: „Éě„É©„āŅ„ā¶), o kawas no 'Amis, o nga'ayay pitooran, tada kawas no kakarayan. Onol O masowalay paratatengaan o kawas no kalalood ato kawas no pi'adop ci Malataw, o kapah itini i kalalifetan, pi'adopan, ano eca pakalitemoh ko fa'inayan to katalawan nira i, miceli' to ngangan nira to pidipot parihaday to tireng . I 'ayaw no kalalifetan a malalood o masinanotay ko faloco' mita'ong, mingitangit to kawas pa'icel sakapilowid a minokay, caay ko nian aca, ano caay ko nipatangican, tatiih a mitahidang to ngangan ni Malataw. Itini roma a niyaro', mapacakat ci Malataw a pala-cidal a kawas (tinako Kaliyawan no Kalingko) . Talawadaw a 'Amis/Pangcah O mama a tireng ci Malataw :22, o mama ko todong no folad, saka manga'ay nira mikowan ko no folad a malengaway, sera, kinaira, o'ol kadit a onol ato nipaloma'an to demak no 'orip, laloma'an ato tekedan :163 a Malataw, tana pakoloma' ahan ko cecay niyaro' i,o mikacaway to "niyaro'" cingra (no 'Atolan a sowal) , aci Dongi a mararamod, ciwawa ci cidal aci Foladan . No Kiwit a nisowalan a Malataw o cecay no ngasaw a kawas no sowal, maro' i kakarayan :25 No Kiwid a cipas no ka'etipay mi'adopay a kawas :84 Pasawali a 'Amis O polong no cidal, folad, fo'is ci Malataw :223. Cikasoan a 'Amis O kawakawas no sakalalood ci Malataw :27 Falangaw 'Amis Palidaw 'Amis Malataw o satakaraway a tadamaanay kawas, o lalengawan no kawakawas, mikowanay no serayan, mikowanay to kaloiraay a kawas; aci misanga'ay to kalomaamaan a Dongi mapolong mikowan to serayan kadademak ato caayay pitolas a 'orip , orasaka o polong no 'edaw ira ko pita'ong i ciiraan, tona ira to ko Kristokiw a tayni itiya, ci Malataw aci Dongi mapalecad to Kawas i kakarayan ato Ina Miliya . Sasowalan "Malataw" no to'as a sowal no 'Amis, naicowaay caay to ko kafana'en, nika paratatengan o i takaraway kawas, so'elinay kawas, tadakawas sanay ko kakiharan. Roma a niyaro', Malataw o "I kakarayanay a Kawas" saan ko pitahidang . Cengel O lodis no 'Amis enemay ko cengel a kohecalay, salongan maomahay kawas ci Malataw . Roma I pasaetip ko aro' ni Malataw, nawhani tadamaan ko paenararan, o sarakatay ni ta'ongan a kawas itira i kailisinan , citodongay i kakero'an a nipacakatan . Itini hikoki no sofitay i Kalingko, F-16 tatirengan no hikoki o cidal a palakawasan ni Malataw a losid . Pinengnengan a tilid. 2.Da lu za zhi she," (PDF). " (PDF). . 2009-06 (2022-04-18). ISBN 9789860183054. ( Malataw) . (2018-07-04). Pahecian
S.PHON: == ma…ĺataw == ma…ĺataw ( °amis: ma…ĺatao~u/ma…ĺataw/ma…ĺa…¨~…ģao~u~u/marato~uo~u :***; kafa…ĺan: ma…ĺa…¨~…ģaw/mata…ĺ…ô…ĺ; saki*aja: ma…ĺa…¨~…ģaw; …¨~…ģipo~uŇč: ****), o~u kawas no~u °amis, o~u Ňča °ajaj pito~uo~uran, ta…¨~…ģa kawas no~u kakarajan. o~uno~u…ĺ o~u maso~uwa…ĺaj paratat…ôŇčaan o~u kawas no~u ka…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ ato~u kawas no~u pi °a…¨~…ģo~up ¶i ma…ĺataw, o~u kapańß itini i ka…ĺa…ĺif…ôtan, pi °a…¨~…ģo~upan, ano~u …ô ¶a paka…ĺit…ômo~uńß ko~u fa °inajan to~u kata…ĺawan nira i, mi ¶…ô…ĺi ° to~u ŇčaŇčan nira to~u pi…¨~…ģipo~ut parińßa…¨~…ģaj to~u tir…ôŇč . i °ajaw no~u ka…ĺa…ĺif…ôtan a ma…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ o~u masinano~utaj ko~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° mita °o~uŇč, miŇčitaŇčit to~u kawas pa °i ¶…ô…ĺ sakapi…ĺo~uwi…¨~…ģ a mino~ukaj, ¶aaj ko~u nian a ¶a, ano~u ¶aaj ko~u nipataŇči ¶an, tatiińß a mitańßi…¨~…ģaŇč to~u ŇčaŇčan ni ma…ĺataw. itini ro~uma a nijaro~u °, mapa ¶akat ¶i ma…ĺataw a pa…ĺa- ¶i…¨~…ģa…ĺ a kawas (tinako~u ka…ĺijawan no~u ka…ĺiŇčko~u) . ta…ĺawa…¨~…ģaw a °amis/paŇč ¶ańß o~u mama a tir…ôŇč ¶i ma…ĺataw :**, o~u mama ko~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč no~u fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, saka maŇča °aj nira miko~uwan ko~u no~u fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ a ma…ĺ…ôŇčawaj, s…ôra, kinaira, o~u °o~u…ĺ ka…¨~…ģit a o~uno~u…ĺ ato~u nipa…ĺo~uma °an to~u …¨~…ģ…ômak no~u °o~urip, …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an ato~u t…ôk…ô…¨~…ģan :*** a ma…ĺataw, tana pako~u…ĺo~uma ° ańßan ko~u ¶…ô ¶aj nijaro~u ° i,o~u mika ¶awaj to~u "nijaro~u °" ¶iŇčra (no~u °ato~u…ĺan a so~uwa…ĺ) , a ¶i …¨~…ģo~uŇči a mararamo~u…¨~…ģ, ¶iwawa ¶i ¶i…¨~…ģa…ĺ a ¶i fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģan . no~u kiwit a niso~uwa…ĺan a ma…ĺataw o~u ¶…ô ¶aj no~u Ňčasaw a kawas no~u so~uwa…ĺ, maro~u ° i kakarajan :** no~u kiwi…¨~…ģ a ¶ipas no~u ka °…ôtipaj mi °a…¨~…ģo~upaj a kawas :** pasawa…ĺi a °amis o~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u ¶i…¨~…ģa…ĺ, fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, fo~u °is ¶i ma…ĺataw :***. ¶ikaso~uan a °amis o~u kawakawas no~u saka…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ ¶i ma…ĺataw :** fa…ĺaŇčaw °amis pa…ĺi…¨~…ģaw °amis ma…ĺataw o~u satakarawaj a ta…¨~…ģamaanaj kawas, o~u …ĺa…ĺ…ôŇčawan no~u kawakawas, miko~uwanaj no~u s…ôrajan, miko~uwanaj to~u ka…ĺo~uiraaj a kawas; a ¶i misaŇča °aj to~u ka…ĺo~umaamaan a …¨~…ģo~uŇči mapo~u…ĺo~uŇč miko~uwan to~u s…ôrajan ka…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ…ômak ato~u ¶aajaj pito~u…ĺas a °o~urip , o~urasaka o~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u °…ô…¨~…ģaw ira ko~u pita °o~uŇč i ¶iiraan, to~una ira to~u ko~u kristo~ukiw a tajni itija, ¶i ma…ĺataw a ¶i …¨~…ģo~uŇči mapa…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ to~u kawas i kakarajan ato~u ina mi…ĺija . saso~uwa…ĺan "ma…ĺataw" no~u to~u °as a so~uwa…ĺ no~u °amis, nai ¶o~uwaaj ¶aaj to~u ko~u kafana °…ôn, nika paratat…ôŇčan o~u i takarawaj kawas, so~u °…ô…ĺinaj kawas, ta…¨~…ģakawas sanaj ko~u kakińßaran. ro~uma a nijaro~u °, ma…ĺataw o~u "i kakarajanaj a kawas" saan ko~u pitańßi…¨~…ģaŇč . ¶…ôŇč…ô…ĺ o~u …ĺo~u…¨~…ģis no~u °amis …ôn…ômaj ko~u ¶…ôŇč…ô…ĺ a ko~uńß…ô ¶a…ĺaj, sa…ĺo~uŇčan mao~umańßaj kawas ¶i ma…ĺataw . ro~uma i pasa…ôtip ko~u aro~u ° ni ma…ĺataw, nawńßani ta…¨~…ģamaan ko~u pa…ônararan, o~u sarakataj ni ta °o~uŇčan a kawas itira i kai…ĺisinan , ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj i kak…ôro~u °an a nipa ¶akatan . itini ńßiko~uki no~u so~ufitaj i ka…ĺiŇčko~u, f-** tatir…ôŇčan no~u ńßiko~uki o~u ¶i…¨~…ģa…ĺ a pa…ĺakawasan ni ma…ĺataw a …ĺo~usi…¨~…ģ . pin…ôŇčn…ôŇčan a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ. *.…¨~…ģa …ĺo~u~u *a *ńßi sńß…ô," (p…¨~…ģf). " (p…¨~…ģf). . ****-** (****-**-**). isb~b~vn *************. ( ma…ĺataw) . (****-**-**). pańß…ô ¶ian
S.FORM: == Malataw == Malataw ('Amis: Malatao/Malataw/Maladau/Maratoo :281; Kafalan: Maladaw/Matalel; Sakizaya: Maladaw; Dipong: „Éě„É©„āŅ„ā¶), o kawas no 'Amis, o nga'ayay pitooran, tada kawas no kakarayan. Onol O masowalay paratatengaan o kawas no kalalood ato kawas no pi'adop ci Malataw, o kapah itini i kalalifetan, pi'adopan, ano eca pakalitemoh ko fa'inayan to katalawan nira i, miceli' to ngangan nira to pidipot parihaday to tireng . I 'ayaw no kalalifetan a malalood o masinanotay ko faloco' mita'ong, mingitangit to kawas pa'icel sakapilowid a minokay, caay ko nian aca, ano caay ko nipatangican, tatiih a mitahidang to ngangan ni Malataw. Itini roma a niyaro', mapacakat ci Malataw a pala-cidal a kawas (tinako Kaliyawan no Kalingko) . Talawadaw a 'Amis/Pangcah O mama a tireng ci Malataw :22, o mama ko todong no folad, saka manga'ay nira mikowan ko no folad a malengaway, sera, kinaira, o'ol kadit a onol ato nipaloma'an to demak no 'orip, laloma'an ato tekedan :163 a Malataw, tana pakoloma' ahan ko cecay niyaro' i,o mikacaway to "niyaro'" cingra (no 'Atolan a sowal) , aci Dongi a mararamod, ciwawa ci cidal aci Foladan . No Kiwit a nisowalan a Malataw o cecay no ngasaw a kawas no sowal, maro' i kakarayan :25 No Kiwid a cipas no ka'etipay mi'adopay a kawas :84 Pasawali a 'Amis O polong no cidal, folad, fo'is ci Malataw :223. Cikasoan a 'Amis O kawakawas no sakalalood ci Malataw :27 Falangaw 'Amis Palidaw 'Amis Malataw o satakaraway a tadamaanay kawas, o lalengawan no kawakawas, mikowanay no serayan, mikowanay to kaloiraay a kawas; aci misanga'ay to kalomaamaan a Dongi mapolong mikowan to serayan kadademak ato caayay pitolas a 'orip , orasaka o polong no 'edaw ira ko pita'ong i ciiraan, tona ira to ko Kristokiw a tayni itiya, ci Malataw aci Dongi mapalecad to Kawas i kakarayan ato Ina Miliya . Sasowalan "Malataw" no to'as a sowal no 'Amis, naicowaay caay to ko kafana'en, nika paratatengan o i takaraway kawas, so'elinay kawas, tadakawas sanay ko kakiharan. Roma a niyaro', Malataw o "I kakarayanay a Kawas" saan ko pitahidang . Cengel O lodis no 'Amis enemay ko cengel a kohecalay, salongan maomahay kawas ci Malataw . Roma I pasaetip ko aro' ni Malataw, nawhani tadamaan ko paenararan, o sarakatay ni ta'ongan a kawas itira i kailisinan , citodongay i kakero'an a nipacakatan . Itini hikoki no sofitay i Kalingko, F-16 tatirengan no hikoki o cidal a palakawasan ni Malataw a losid . Pinengnengan a tilid. 2.Da lu za zhi she," (PDF). " (PDF). . 2009-06 (2022-04-18). ISBN 9789860183054. ( Malataw) . (2018-07-04). Pahecian
S.PHON: == ma…ĺataw == ma…ĺataw ( °amis: ma…ĺatao~u/ma…ĺataw/ma…ĺa…¨~…ģao~u~u/marato~uo~u :***; kafa…ĺan: ma…ĺa…¨~…ģaw/mata…ĺ…ô…ĺ; saki*aja: ma…ĺa…¨~…ģaw; …¨~…ģipo~uŇč: ****), o~u kawas no~u °amis, o~u Ňča °ajaj pito~uo~uran, ta…¨~…ģa kawas no~u kakarajan. o~uno~u…ĺ o~u maso~uwa…ĺaj paratat…ôŇčaan o~u kawas no~u ka…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ ato~u kawas no~u pi °a…¨~…ģo~up ¶i ma…ĺataw, o~u kapańß itini i ka…ĺa…ĺif…ôtan, pi °a…¨~…ģo~upan, ano~u …ô ¶a paka…ĺit…ômo~uńß ko~u fa °inajan to~u kata…ĺawan nira i, mi ¶…ô…ĺi ° to~u ŇčaŇčan nira to~u pi…¨~…ģipo~ut parińßa…¨~…ģaj to~u tir…ôŇč . i °ajaw no~u ka…ĺa…ĺif…ôtan a ma…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ o~u masinano~utaj ko~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° mita °o~uŇč, miŇčitaŇčit to~u kawas pa °i ¶…ô…ĺ sakapi…ĺo~uwi…¨~…ģ a mino~ukaj, ¶aaj ko~u nian a ¶a, ano~u ¶aaj ko~u nipataŇči ¶an, tatiińß a mitańßi…¨~…ģaŇč to~u ŇčaŇčan ni ma…ĺataw. itini ro~uma a nijaro~u °, mapa ¶akat ¶i ma…ĺataw a pa…ĺa- ¶i…¨~…ģa…ĺ a kawas (tinako~u ka…ĺijawan no~u ka…ĺiŇčko~u) . ta…ĺawa…¨~…ģaw a °amis/paŇč ¶ańß o~u mama a tir…ôŇč ¶i ma…ĺataw :**, o~u mama ko~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč no~u fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, saka maŇča °aj nira miko~uwan ko~u no~u fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ a ma…ĺ…ôŇčawaj, s…ôra, kinaira, o~u °o~u…ĺ ka…¨~…ģit a o~uno~u…ĺ ato~u nipa…ĺo~uma °an to~u …¨~…ģ…ômak no~u °o~urip, …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an ato~u t…ôk…ô…¨~…ģan :*** a ma…ĺataw, tana pako~u…ĺo~uma ° ańßan ko~u ¶…ô ¶aj nijaro~u ° i,o~u mika ¶awaj to~u "nijaro~u °" ¶iŇčra (no~u °ato~u…ĺan a so~uwa…ĺ) , a ¶i …¨~…ģo~uŇči a mararamo~u…¨~…ģ, ¶iwawa ¶i ¶i…¨~…ģa…ĺ a ¶i fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģan . no~u kiwit a niso~uwa…ĺan a ma…ĺataw o~u ¶…ô ¶aj no~u Ňčasaw a kawas no~u so~uwa…ĺ, maro~u ° i kakarajan :** no~u kiwi…¨~…ģ a ¶ipas no~u ka °…ôtipaj mi °a…¨~…ģo~upaj a kawas :** pasawa…ĺi a °amis o~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u ¶i…¨~…ģa…ĺ, fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, fo~u °is ¶i ma…ĺataw :***. ¶ikaso~uan a °amis o~u kawakawas no~u saka…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ ¶i ma…ĺataw :** fa…ĺaŇčaw °amis pa…ĺi…¨~…ģaw °amis ma…ĺataw o~u satakarawaj a ta…¨~…ģamaanaj kawas, o~u …ĺa…ĺ…ôŇčawan no~u kawakawas, miko~uwanaj no~u s…ôrajan, miko~uwanaj to~u ka…ĺo~uiraaj a kawas; a ¶i misaŇča °aj to~u ka…ĺo~umaamaan a …¨~…ģo~uŇči mapo~u…ĺo~uŇč miko~uwan to~u s…ôrajan ka…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ…ômak ato~u ¶aajaj pito~u…ĺas a °o~urip , o~urasaka o~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u °…ô…¨~…ģaw ira ko~u pita °o~uŇč i ¶iiraan, to~una ira to~u ko~u kristo~ukiw a tajni itija, ¶i ma…ĺataw a ¶i …¨~…ģo~uŇči mapa…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ to~u kawas i kakarajan ato~u ina mi…ĺija . saso~uwa…ĺan "ma…ĺataw" no~u to~u °as a so~uwa…ĺ no~u °amis, nai ¶o~uwaaj ¶aaj to~u ko~u kafana °…ôn, nika paratat…ôŇčan o~u i takarawaj kawas, so~u °…ô…ĺinaj kawas, ta…¨~…ģakawas sanaj ko~u kakińßaran. ro~uma a nijaro~u °, ma…ĺataw o~u "i kakarajanaj a kawas" saan ko~u pitańßi…¨~…ģaŇč . ¶…ôŇč…ô…ĺ o~u …ĺo~u…¨~…ģis no~u °amis …ôn…ômaj ko~u ¶…ôŇč…ô…ĺ a ko~uńß…ô ¶a…ĺaj, sa…ĺo~uŇčan mao~umańßaj kawas ¶i ma…ĺataw . ro~uma i pasa…ôtip ko~u aro~u ° ni ma…ĺataw, nawńßani ta…¨~…ģamaan ko~u pa…ônararan, o~u sarakataj ni ta °o~uŇčan a kawas itira i kai…ĺisinan , ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj i kak…ôro~u °an a nipa ¶akatan . itini ńßiko~uki no~u so~ufitaj i ka…ĺiŇčko~u, f-** tatir…ôŇčan no~u ńßiko~uki o~u ¶i…¨~…ģa…ĺ a pa…ĺakawasan ni ma…ĺataw a …ĺo~usi…¨~…ģ . pin…ôŇčn…ôŇčan a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ. *.…¨~…ģa …ĺo~u~u *a *ńßi sńß…ô," (p…¨~…ģf).
